_about: The full Dutch words the player TYPES to refer to each object. The parser matches a typed noun by its first 4 characters, so the engine derives each object's parser token as word[:4].upper() (knoflook -> KNOF). Translating a word here (knoflook -> garlic) lets the engine derive the target-language token (GARL) so object nouns are typeable in that language. Verified: for every object, word[:4].upper() reproduces DRACULA.TXT's original tokens, so the Dutch build is unchanged. Objects with no parser tokens (fixtures / state records) are omitted.
